phrases.example: To be fair, I can see why some people like it.
I’m not entirely convinced that it’s worth the price.
What I mean is, the quality isn’t consistent.
I get your point, but I had a different experience.
That said, the service is usually great.

phrases.text: We might be talking past each other.
phrases.example: We might be talking past each other—let me rephrase.
Let’s agree to disagree and move on.

phrases.text: Can we park this for now?
phrases.example: Can we park this for now and enjoy our drinks?
Just to clarify, I wasn’t criticizing you.
I appreciate your perspective, even if I disagree.
